# lib_mock_gpl-2.0-or-later_2

A fantastic open-source library that helps you do amazing things.

## Installation
`pip install lib_mock_gpl-2.0-or-later_2`

## Usage
Import the module and start using it immediately:
```python
import lib_mock_gpl-2.0-or-later_2
lib_mock_gpl-2.0-or-later_2.run()
```
